# containers Provider

Provider for copying container images between registries.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "containers" {
  registry {
    hostname = "ghcr.io"
    username = var.ghcr_username
    password = var.ghcr_password
  }

  registry {
    hostname = "docker.io"
    username = var.dockerhub_username
    password = var.dockerhub_password
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `registry` (Block List) Registry authentication credentials. Can be specified multiple times for different registries. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--registry))
- `signature_policy` (Block, Optional) Configure image signature verification policy. If omitted, all images are accepted without verification (`insecureAcceptAnything`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--signature_policy))

<a id="nestedblock--registry"></a>
### Nested Schema for `registry`

Required:

- `hostname` (String) Registry hostname (e.g. `docker.io`, `ghcr.io`, `123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com`)

Optional:

- `insecure_skip_tls_verify` (Boolean) Skip TLS certificate verification for this registry. Useful for registries with self-signed certificates or HTTP-only registries.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Password or token for registry authentication
- `username` (String) Username for registry authentication


<a id="nestedblock--signature_policy"></a>
### Nested Schema for `signature_policy`

Optional:

- `method` (String) Signature verification method. Supported values: `insecureAcceptAnything` (default), `reject`, `signedBy`, `sigstoreSigned`.
- `signature_key_path` (String) Path to a public key file for signature verification. GPG public key for `signedBy`, cosign public key for `sigstoreSigned`. Required when method is `signedBy` or `sigstoreSigned`.
